title: 3D projectiles
description: Makes eggs, fireballs, potions, and snowballs be 3D when in projectile form!
body:
## Summary
Makes eggs, fireballs, potions, and snowballs be 3d when in projectile form!

## Credits
The fireball texture is taken from [Jaden Nether's expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion) and were made by ThatJadenXgamer.
